title: How Y Combinator's CEO ACTUALLY Uses Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes four strategies that Garry Tan uses to leverage Claude Code for rapid development while leading Y Combinator. The strategies include role assignment, parallel sessions, custom tool building, and planning before implementation. The analysis draws from Tan's public work and the open-source gstack system.
